mapper.sql: refund_id, order_id, user_id, refund_reason, refund_amount, refund_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into tb_turquoise_refund (refund_id, order_id, user_id, refund_reason, refund_amount, refund_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refundStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into tb_turquoise_refund
refund_id, order_id, user_id, refund_reason, refund_amount, refund_status, create_time, update_time,
#{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refundAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refundStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update: update tb_turquoise_refund set order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, refund_reason = #{refundReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, refund_status = #{refundStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where refund_id = #{refundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from tb_turquoise_refund order by create_time desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
